biological_replicate: transplanted these human AML cells into immunodeficient NSG-SGM3 (NSGS) recipient mice
technical_replicate: the frequency of each integrated sgRNA construct was monitored on day 0 and day 28 using high-throughput sequencing
experimental_design: This 'human‐in‐mouse' xenograft leukemia model revealed a significant reduction in leukemia burden upon COX4I1 depletion
factor_value: depletion of COX4I1 hindered leukemia cell proliferation
